38efbe7f-3a6c-4538-bb30-565bc376716a.name: vCenter Number of Linux VMs
38efbe7f-3a6c-4538-bb30-565bc376716a.formula: count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=VirtualMachine, metric=config|guestFullName, depth=4, where ="config|guestFullName contains Linux"})
38efbe7f-3a6c-4538-bb30-565bc376716a.description: Total Number of Linux VMs at the vCenter level
